name: product-launch
description: 7-email sequence for launching new products to existing list
goal: Generate excitement and sales for new product

emails.subject_B: I've been working on this for 3 months
emails.body:
{{first_name}},

I've been quiet lately.

There's a reason.

For the past 3 months, I've been building something. Something big.

**I can't tell you what it is yet.**

But here's what I CAN tell you:

✅ It will save you 20+ hours/week
✅ It's based on my proven automation framework
✅ It's launching in 7 days
✅ Early subscribers get 50% off

**More Details:**
- Day 2: First reveal
- Day 4: Behind-the-scenes look
- Day 6: Early access
- Day 7: Official launch

This is going to change how you work.

Stay tuned,
n0mad

P.S. Seriously, don't miss this. Set a reminder.

{{first_name}},

Okay, I can finally tell you.

**Introducing: AutomationOS**

The all-in-one platform for solopreneurs who want to automate everything.

**What It Does:**

🤖 **Content Engine**
- AI blog writer
- Auto-publish to newsletter + social
- SEO optimization

📧 **Email Automation**
- Welcome sequences
- Drip campaigns
- Behavioral triggers

💰 **Revenue Systems**
- Product delivery
- Payment processing
- Customer onboarding

📊 **Analytics Dashboard**
- Performance tracking
- A/B testing
- Revenue attribution

**The Problem It Solves:**

Right now, you're using 10+ tools:
- Blog platform
- Email service
- Social scheduler
- Payment processor
- Analytics tool
- Etc.

**Each costs $20-50/month. Total: $200-500/month.**

AutomationOS replaces all of them.

**One platform. One price. Everything automated.**

**Launching in 5 days.**

[Join the Waitlist (50% Off)]({{waitlist_link}})

More details coming soon,
n0mad

emails.subject_B: How I built this (and almost quit)
emails.body:
{{first_name}},

Building AutomationOS almost broke me.

**The Journey:**

**Month 1:** Built the content engine. Tested with 10 beta users. 8 said it was "too complicated." Back to the drawing board.

**Month 2:** Simplified everything. Made it 1-click setup. Beta users loved it. Then the servers crashed. Spent 2 weeks fixing infrastructure.

**Month 3:** Added email automation, payment processing, analytics. Integrated everything. Finally, it worked.

**The Result:** A platform I'm genuinely proud of.

**Watch the Behind-the-Scenes Video:**
[See How It Works]({{demo_video_link}})

Inside:
- Full platform walkthrough
- Live demo of automations
- Real results from beta users
- Pricing reveal

**Beta User Results:**
- "Saved 25 hours/week" - Sarah M.
- "Made $5K in first month" - Mike R.
- "Replaced 7 tools with one" - Jennifer K.

**Launching in 4 days.**

[Secure Your 50% Discount]({{waitlist_link}})

n0mad

P.S. Waitlist closes in 48 hours. After that, no early access discount.

**That's $2,112-5,712/year.**

For $24/month.

**But forget the money. Here's what really matters:**

**Where will you be in 6 months?**

**Without AutomationOS:**

**With AutomationOS:**
